meta.name: The real Matryoshka: A Documentary by Karime Pindter
meta.description: After more than a decade of showing herself without filters in front of millions of viewers, Karime Pindter shares how she is preparing for the most intimidating challenge of her life: performing at the finale of La Más Draga in front of 20,000 people at one of the country’s most iconic venues… without knowing how to dance.
